Reciprocity by State

Compact States

13

Your home-state license may already cover these states via compact privilege.

State Fee Timeline Speed
Georgia $85 15 to 20 Business Days Long Iowa $120 3 to 4 Weeks Long Nebraska $114 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate New Hampshire $110 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Ohio $228 ~2 Weeks Fast Oklahoma $120 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate South Dakota $70 3 to 4 Weeks Long Tennessee $140 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Utah $60 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Washington $81 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate West Virginia $69 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Wisconsin $60 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Wyoming $200 1 to 2 Weeks Fast

Endorsement States

33

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

State Fee Timeline Speed
Alabama $250 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Alaska $150 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Arkansas $110 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Connecticut $190 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Delaware $235 3 to 5 Weeks Long District of Columbia $229 ~3–5 Weeks Long Florida $165 30 days (initial review) Long Hawaii $225 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Idaho $100 3 to 4 Weeks Long Illinois $100 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Indiana $20 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Kansas $140 3 to 4 Weeks Long Kentucky $50 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Louisiana $100 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Maine $171 3 to 5 Weeks Long Maryland $300 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Massachusetts $196 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Minnesota $282 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Mississippi $100 3 to 4 Weeks Long Missouri $50 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Montana $75 3 to 5 Weeks Long Nevada $237 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate New Jersey $200 TBD (Regulations Pending) Long New Mexico $200 Varies (~2 Weeks) Fast New York $294 ~6 Weeks Moderate North Carolina $248 2 to 3 Business Days Long North Dakota $75 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Oregon $110 3 to 4 Weeks Long Pennsylvania $95 4 to 8 Weeks Long Rhode Island $75 3 to 5 Weeks Long South Carolina $175 4 to 6 Weeks Moderate Texas $142 2 to 4 Weeks Fast Vermont $100 2 to 4 Weeks Fast

CDR States

5

No state license required — national CDR credential only.

State Fee Timeline Speed
Arizona — No state app None California — No state app None Colorado — No state app None Michigan — No state app None Virginia — No state app None

No States Found

Try adjusting your search or clearing your filters.

How to use this directory

Start with the path filter to narrow by compact, endorsement, or CDR. Sort by fee or speed to find your fastest or cheapest route. Open any state to see the full board-verified guide with steps, documents, and renewal info.
